response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished senior full-stack and systems software engineer with strong web, testing, and open-source credentials, but his background has essentially no overlap with this role's core requirements. There is no evidence of SoC or IP modeling, hardware architecture, AI accelerator or GPU work, or deep-learning workload analysis. His closest relevant experience is low-latency backend services in DLang and some C/C++ IDE component work, which falls far short of principal-level hardware-software co-design and performance architecture for AI silicon.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Meets the BS + 8+ years technical experience threshold with broad, sustained engineering career
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, open-source tooling, and C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, system-on-chip design, or hardware-software co-design experience
No AI/deep-learning workload, GPU architecture, or SIMD/MIMD background
Career trajectory is web/full-stack product engineering, not performance architecture at principal level

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or deep-learning workload expertise
Systems-level performance and low-latency engineering background
